face.structure: heart-shaped with a softly pointed chin, high cheekbones that accentuate an inquisitive nature

details: dynamic lighting with a soft, natural shadow around the lashes

face.expression: contemplative with a slight upward curve of the lips suggesting a bemused thought

skin.texture: velvety smooth with a light dusting of freckles across the nose
skin.rendering_notes: gently matte with slight specular highlights on the forehead and cheeks

hair.style: long and straight with a slight wave towards the ends
hair.flow: flows freely, cascading over shoulders, with dynamic movement suggested by fine strands drifting lightly as if caught by a gentle breeze
details: soft shine with hints of lighter strands catching the light

character.aura: an ethereal shimmer that hints of creativity and an unbound curiosity

outfit.base: a minimalist ivory blouse with an asymmetrical hem
outfit.design: subtle geometric embroidery along the collar and cuffs
outfit.fit: tailored yet relaxed, allowing freedom of movement

composition.framing: close-up with a focus on upper torso and face
composition.pose: head slightly tilted to the side as if in mid-thought
composition.gesture: one hand gently resting against the side of the face, the other clutching a sketchbook with visible pencil tucked in

background.color_palette: soothing pastels of blues and greens with soft gradients
background.details: hints of swirling clouds that signify imagination
background.rules: not overpowering, should complement the character's introspective aura
